/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/ClusterSIL.dir/ClusterSIL_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClusterSIL.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClusterSIL.dir/clustersil_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClusterSIL.dir/linux_build/.rcc/qrc_qmake_ClusterUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClusterSIL.dir/src/ClusterBackend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClusterSIL.dir/linux_build/.rcc/qmlcache/ClusterSIL_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClusterSIL.dir/linux_build/.rcc/qmlcache/ClusterSIL_ui/main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClusterSIL.dir/linux_build/.rcc/qrc_ClusterSIL_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o ClusterSIL  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Quick.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlModels.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Qml.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
